info.name: NextPressKit Admin API
info.description:
Protected admin endpoints under /admin.

Auth: set environment `jwt_auth_source` to `cookie` (default) or `header`. Cookie mode relies on Postman's cookie jar after `POST /auth/login` from the Public collection (same `base_url`; login body uses `{{superadmin_email}}` / `{{superadmin_password}}`). Header mode sends `Authorization: Bearer {{admin_access_token}}` from the collection pre-request script (run login in header mode to populate tokens).
